=Module <<a_api_type | module Header >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Header >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEt"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Header>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>> >><<pre id="VALof_option" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|of~_option>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Header.t >> option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Header.t >>>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api text="Name" | module Header.Name >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Header.Name >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api text="Mime_type" | module Header.Mime_type >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Header.Mime_type >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api text="Accept" | module Header.Accept >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Header.Accept >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api text="Accept_encoding" | module Header.Accept_encoding >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Header.Accept_encoding >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api text="Accept_language" | module Header.Accept_language >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Header.Accept_language >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<a_api text="Content_type" | module Header.Content_type >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Header.Content_type >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
